# UC-22.57.15 · SG Cyber Act master CSA compliance dashboard + Commissioner attestation roll-up

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Governance &middot; **Wave:** Run &middot; **Status:** Verified

*All the smaller Singapore cyber checks roll into one dashboard so the boss can see at a glance what's healthy and what's not.*

---

## Description

Roll-up panel showing UC-22.57.x compliance health.

## Value

Commissioner-facing scorecard.

## Implementation

(1) Schedule UC-22.57.15 daily. (2) Build `CSA Master Scorecard` dashboard.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.57.15` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `csa_clause="CSA-master-rollup"`.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Force any UC-22.57.x violation. UC-22.57.15 MUST reflect within 24h.

### Negative scenario

Resolve. UC-22.57.15 MUST roll up green.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

All UC-22.57.1 through UC-22.57.14 running.

## Step 1 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.57.15: CSA Master Roll-Up]
cron_schedule = 51 13 * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.57.15,reg=SG-Cyber-Act,clause=CSA-master-rollup
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 2 — Runbook

Monthly CC review, quarterly Board update.

**SG-specific failure modes**:
- **Commissioner deep-dive**: each UC must stand alone for inspector review.

## SPL

```spl
search index=audit_evidence reg=SG-Cyber-Act earliest=-30d@d
| eval uc = case(
    match(_raw, "uc=22\.57\."), "22.57." + replace(_raw, ".*uc=22\.57\.(\d+).*", "\1"),
    1=1, "unknown")
| stats count as evidence_rows latest(_time) as last_evidence by uc
| eval hours_since_evidence = round((now() - last_evidence) / 3600, 1)
| eval health = case(
    hours_since_evidence > 48, "stale",
    evidence_rows = 0, "missing",
    1=1, "current")
| sort uc
| table uc evidence_rows last_evidence hours_since_evidence health
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Per-UC health. (Panel 2) Trend. (Panel 3) Top outstanding. (Panel 4) Attestation history.

## Known False Positives

1. **UC cadence drift**: tune per UC.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `csa_22_57_15_exceptions`.

## References

- [Cybersecurity Act 2018 + 2024 amendment](https://sso.agc.gov.sg/Act/CA2018)
